C0300C_RPT_CRCT_DAY_CD Temporal Orientation: Able to report correct day Indicates the patient's ability to report the correct day of the week. 0. Incorrect or no answer
1. Correct CHAR 1 x
C0400A_RCALL_FIRST_WORD_CD Recall: Able to recall 'sock' Indicates patient's ability to recall the word 'sock' from C0200 word repetition exercise. 0. No – could not
